description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a spacious, landscaped lot featuring a large backyard, mature trees, and a swimming pool. The building itself is single-story with a flat roof and a clean, rectilinear layout, characterized by large windows and open outdoor living spaces. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a patio area with outdoor seating, and a well-maintained lawn. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or painted concrete, complemented by glass and metal accents. The pool is centrally located in the backyard, surrounded by greenery and paved walkways. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and integration with the surrounding garden.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a swimming pool, and landscaped grounds featuring mature trees and a garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and a variety of trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, patio area, and the open backyard with extensive green space.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, backyard, and a secondary structure or garage at the back corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the pool, patio, and a large expanse of lawn with trees along the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
